title: hieracium rupicaprinum subsp. graellsianum
intro: Hieracium rupicaprinum subsp. graellsianum, also known as Graells' Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family Asteraceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium rupicaprinum subsp. graellsianum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal preparation methods.
